prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-MUSICALSTARORGAN-PARENT Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: KidPlay Organ Musical Instrument Electronic Keyboard Kids Toy (3 Colors) Description: The Interactive Kids Music Star 22-Key Electronic Keyboard Toy Play Set is am excellent developmental learning kids toy that promotes healthy educational learning skills, along with hand-eye coordination, making this item a great addition to any toy collection.

This fun kids keyboard features pre recorded sounds that with the push of a button make animal sounds, a record-tune function button, instrumental sounds, and rhythms. Each instrument is constructed of durable plastic and is safe for all kids at least 3 years old. The keyboard even has a top carry handle for easy transportation, portability and clean up.

This is the ideal beginner kids keyboard that helps teach the basics of music while keeping children entertained with flashing lights that will ensure hours of fun.

This rockin' set is a wonderful gift idea for young boy or girl who is an aspiring musician Search Terms: musical toys rockstar kids keyboard light up educational Features: - HOURS OF ENTERTAINMENT: Ideal for beginners, the 22-key interactive music keyboard toy will keep a Childs focus with the Flashing Lights and recording functions of this playset - KEY FUNCTIONS: 22 Musical Keys | 8 Musical Instrument Buttons | Programmed Animal Sounds | Replay & Demo Modes | 4 Programmed Rhythms | Tempo & Volume Control - INTERACTIVE LEARNING: Excellent developmental learning kids toy that promotes healthy educational learning skills, along with hand-eye coordination - SPECIFICATIONS: Colors Available: Pink, Blue or Yellow | Material: Durable ABS Plastic | Safe for Kids Ages 3+ - Ideal childrens musical gift for young toddlers and children, recommended for ages 3 to 5 === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay 22-Key Electronic Keyboard Musical Instrument Toy

anthropic.title_differentiation: 22 Keys, 8 Instruments, Animal Sounds, Flashing Lights, Recording Function, Ages 3, Pink Blue Yellow

openai.title_differentiation: 22 Keys, Flashing Lights, Record And Replay Modes, Animal Sounds, 8 Instrument Buttons, Tempo And Volume Control
